## Description
Adds a new text insertion mode setting near Copy to Clipboard and makes Reliable Paste the default for more dependable dictation insertion across browsers and desktop apps. Also preserves an Experimental Direct Typing path for users who want to try to avoid clipboard changes.

## Type of Change
- [x] 🐞 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [x] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
